title: Ultimate Materials
description: This mod add many materials to Minecraft.  Ultimate Mods
body:
This mod adds many materials to Minecraft Java Edition.  All of these materials have tools and armor.  I'm trying to make it as relistic to Minecraft as possible.  This mod was made by CarlGamer2024, the owner of Ultimate mods. Unfortanatly Ultimate Materials probably won't recive  any more updates because Mcreator refuses to accept internet.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Rubies, Steel, Sodium (Salt but for armor and weapons, in real life it's just salt), Lead, tin, topaz, and aluminum.

</details>



Thanks to MCreator for making me not have to learn Java code.

Ultimate Mods Website:  [ultimatemods.kraczek.co](https://ultimatemods.kraczek.co/)

Ultimate Mods Merch: [Merch Link](https://ultimate-mods.printify.me/)
